title: get_status and post_page expose private/direct posts without auth
description: GET /api/v1/statuses/:id (posting.rs:1779) and GET /@username/:post_id (activitypub.rs:391) have no authentication check and no visibility filtering. Any unauthenticated user who knows or guesses a numeric post ID can read private and direct posts. The status_history endpoint correctly rejects private/direct posts (line 1821), but get_status and post_page do not. These endpoints should return 404 for visibility='private' or 'direct' unless the requester is authenticated and is either the post author or a mentioned/follower recipient.
close_reason: Duplicate of smallhold-9ouq.66 and smallhold-9ouq.67 which already cover the same visibility leak in get_status and account_statuses
